title: Layout
description: A Layout is the structural shell a set of Pages lives within. It defines the top-level UI frame: sidebar, full-width, split-panel, etc.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the layout.

type.description: The structural type of the layout.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of when and how this layout is used.

pages.description: The Page names that use this layout.
